tools.name: find_leads
tools.description: Find scored, in-market B2B leads (hot-signal) for an offer + ICP. Returns a list with a fit score and a call brief, but WITHOUT contacts — call reveal_contact with a row's `ref` to get email/phone. Searching is FREE: credits are only spent on reveals.

tools.name: reveal_contact
tools.description: Reveal a verified email + mobile for a lead `ref` returned by find_leads. Spends 12 credits (email 2 + mobile 10); fully refunded if nothing verifiable is found — you are never charged on a miss.

tools.name: audit_ads
tools.description: Audit a connected Meta ad account (via Adspirer): scores each ad, flags wasted spend, and returns prioritized actions. Spends 5 credits. Omit accountId to audit the demo account.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: find_leads · Private data: find_leads, reveal_contact · Public sink: find_leads, reveal_contact.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: find_leads · Private data: find_leads, reveal_contact · Public sink: find_leads, reveal_contact

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
